name: interactive-engines
description: Simulation engines and acceptance harnesses for a bitcoin education product.

scripts.test: node --import tsx harness/self-test.ts && node --import tsx harness/engine-selftest.ts && node --import tsx harness/run.ts && node --import tsx harness/c5-feasibility.ts && node --import tsx selftests/topology.ts
scripts.verify:packaged: npm run build && tsc -p tsconfig.packaging.json && node --import tsx packaging/built-pin-check.ts
